items.title: Viewer demo + colour fix
items.body: Try the viewer with two weeks of sample data, no sign-in required. HR shifts now render in purple everywhere so they're easy to tell apart from chills.

items.title: Overnight reliability + battery
items.body: Heartbeat watchdog re-checks before re-scheduling, CSV writes batch every 60 rows or 30 seconds, WebSocket pings stretched to 60 seconds, Drive uploads every 5 minutes. Activity back-press uses the new dispatcher so Android 14 swipe-back keeps the session alive.

items.title: Viewer fixes
items.body: Chills sensitivity slider now actually scales the visible count by event ratio. Autonomic verdict surfaces the dominant quadrant when the session average lands in the middle. Avg HR no longer reads null on sessions with BLE gaps. Sunday cells in the week view navigate correctly.

items.title: BLE coexistence with sleep-tracking apps
items.body: Aorti can now share the strap with Sleep As Android (or any other BLE app) in either direction. Bonded device cache + autoConnect=false join the existing link cleanly. The picker also shows already-paired straps even when they aren't currently advertising.

items.title: Broadcast toggle, offline mode, CSV export
items.body: The relay-broadcast switch actually disables publishing now. Sessions can record locally without ever opening the relay. Export CSV opens the system Save-as dialog so the file lands in Downloads (or wherever you pick).
